title: franseria andina
intro: Franseria andina, also known as Chuquiraga, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to the Andean regions of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The health benefits of Franseria andina include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Franseria andina can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine in the form of a decoction or tincture.
